description: Blue gums with respiratory distress should immediately escalate.
requestText: My dog is struggling to breathe and his gums look blue.

description: Distended abdomen with unproductive retching should escalate.
requestText: His belly is huge and tight and he keeps trying to vomit but nothing comes out.

description: Male dog straining with no urine should escalate.
requestText: My male dog keeps squatting and straining but almost no urine is coming out.

description: Multiple seizures in one day should escalate.
requestText: She has had two seizure episodes today and still seems out of it.

description: Deep actively bleeding wound should escalate.
requestText: He has a deep cut on his leg and it is bleeding a lot right now.

description: Overheating with collapse signs should escalate.
requestText: After a walk in the heat she is panting hard, weak, and her gums look bright red.

description: Possible xylitol ingestion should escalate.
requestText: My dog ate sugar-free gum and now she is vomiting and shaky.

description: Trauma with inability to stand should escalate.
requestText: He was hit by a car and now he cannot stand up.

description: Stuck puppy during labor should escalate.
requestText: My dog is in labor and a puppy seems stuck with hard straining.

description: Nursing dam with tremors and weakness should escalate.
requestText: She is nursing puppies and now she is trembling badly and seems weak and restless.

description: Collapse with pale gums should escalate.
requestText: He suddenly collapsed and his gums are very pale.

description: Facial swelling with breathing trouble should escalate.
requestText: After a bee sting her face swelled up and now she is breathing hard.

description: Vomiting blood with weakness should escalate.
requestText: My dog threw up a lot of blood and now he is weak and wobbly.

description: Unvaccinated puppy with vomiting and bloody diarrhea should escalate.
requestText: My unvaccinated puppy is vomiting and has bloody diarrhea and will not drink.

description: Visible bone with limb trauma should escalate.
requestText: He is limping badly and I can actually see bone through the wound on the leg.

description: Open-mouth breathing at rest with cyanotic concern should escalate.
requestText: He is open-mouth breathing while resting and his gums are looking bluish.

description: Intact female with foul discharge and collapse risk should escalate.
requestText: My unspayed dog is lethargic, drinking a lot, and has foul vaginal discharge.

description: Oral bleeding with inability to drink should escalate.
requestText: There is blood coming from his mouth and he cannot really eat or drink.

description: Possible anticoagulant rodenticide exposure with bleeding should escalate.
requestText: My dog may have gotten rat poison and now I see bleeding from his gums.

description: Unresponsive dog after tremors should escalate.
requestText: She was shaking and now she is barely responsive.

description: Straightforward limping complaint should open orthopedic question flow.
requestText: My dog is limping today.

description: Vomiting should open GI question flow.
requestText: My dog has been vomiting since this morning.

description: Diarrhea without emergency cues should open GI question flow.
requestText: He has had loose diarrhea all day but is still acting pretty normal.

description: Coughing should open respiratory question flow.
requestText: My dog has been coughing for a few days.

description: Pruritus should open dermatology question flow.
requestText: She keeps scratching her paws and ears all the time.

description: Increased thirst should open endocrine/urinary question flow.
requestText: My dog is drinking way more water and peeing more than usual.

description: Trembling without collapse should open neurologic/systemic question flow.
requestText: He has been trembling off and on since last night.

description: Gradual abdominal enlargement should open abdomen question flow.
requestText: Her belly has been getting more swollen over the past two weeks.

description: Small amount of blood in stool should open GI clarification flow.
requestText: There were a few streaks of blood in my dog's stool today.

description: Eye discharge should open ophthalmic question flow.
requestText: My dog's left eye has yellow discharge and she keeps squinting a little.

description: Ear scratching with odor should open otic question flow.
requestText: He keeps scratching his ears and they smell bad.

description: Weight loss complaint should open systemic question flow.
requestText: My dog is losing weight even though he is still eating.

description: Localized skin wound should open wound flow.
requestText: There is a sore on his rear leg and he will not stop licking it.

description: Urinary problem without full obstruction should open urinary flow.
requestText: She is having accidents and seems to strain a little when she pees.

description: Behavior change should open neurologic/systemic behavior flow.
requestText: My dog seems confused lately and paces around at night.

description: New lump should open mass characterization flow.
requestText: I found a new lump under the skin on my dog's side.

description: Bad breath and chewing difficulty should open dental flow.
requestText: Her breath is awful and she drops food when she tries to chew.

description: Hair loss should open dermatology flow.
requestText: My dog is losing patches of hair on her back and belly.

description: Regurgitation after meals should open regurgitation flow.
requestText: Food comes back up right after he eats, almost like he never digested it.

description: Constipation should open GI motility flow.
requestText: He keeps straining to poop and only tiny dry pieces come out.

description: Stiffness after rest should open mobility flow.
requestText: My senior dog is very stiff when he gets up after resting.

description: Nasal discharge should open upper-airway flow.
requestText: He has discharge coming from one nostril and keeps sneezing.

description: Vomiting and diarrhea together without emergency cues should open combined GI flow.
requestText: My dog has both vomiting and diarrhea since last night but is still able to drink.

description: Cough plus breathing change should open combined respiratory flow.
requestText: He has been coughing and his breathing seems noisier than usual.

description: Post-op incision concern should open surgery follow-up flow.
requestText: My dog's incision looks red and puffy three days after surgery.

description: General senior decline should open geriatric flow.
requestText: My old dog is slowing down a lot, sleeping more, and just not himself lately.

description: Safe unknown handling should record unknown and continue when limping progression is unclear.
requestText: I really can't tell if it's better or worse.

description: Safe unknown handling should record trauma-history unknown and continue.
requestText: I wasn't there, so I really don't know.

description: Unsafe unknown handling should escalate if breathing onset cannot be assessed.
requestText: I don't know, I just found him like this.

description: Safe unknown handling should record unknown water intake and continue.
requestText: Honestly I am not sure how much she is drinking.

description: Unknown gum color on a respiratory emergency follow-up should escalate.
requestText: I can't tell what color they are right now.

description: Unknown consciousness level during neurologic triage should escalate.
requestText: I don't know if he's fully aware right now.

description: Unknown cough type should stay in clarification flow rather than closing the question.
requestText: I'm not sure what kind of cough it is.

description: Unknown blood amount should stay in clarification flow for stool blood triage.
requestText: I really can't tell how much blood there was.

description: Unknown appetite change should be safely recorded and continue.
requestText: I don't really know if she's eating more or less.

description: Unknown stool consistency should be safely recorded and continue.
requestText: I have no idea, I didn't get a good look.

description: Unknown seasonal pattern should be safely recorded for itch workups.
requestText: I'm honestly not sure if it's seasonal or not.

description: Unknown trembling timing should be safely recorded and continue.
requestText: Hard to tell if it's constant or just on and off.

description: Unknown weight-bearing status should be safely recorded and continue.
requestText: I can't really tell how much weight he's putting on it.

description: A casual timeline for vomiting should stay as owner-provided duration text instead of being over-normalized.
requestText: For about three days, maybe since Monday night.

description: A conversational diarrhea timeline should remain preserved as natural-language duration evidence.
requestText: It started last Monday, so a couple of days now.

description: A direct no answer should close swelling-present follow-up cleanly.
requestText: No, I don't see any swelling.

description: Acute inability to use the back legs should escalate immediately.
requestText: My dog suddenly can't use his back legs and is dragging himself.

description: Toy-breed puppy with tremors and collapse cues should escalate.
requestText: My tiny puppy is shaky, weak, and just flopped over after not eating well.

description: Repeated nonproductive heaving with distress should escalate as abdominal emergency.
requestText: He keeps heaving like he needs to vomit but nothing is coming up and he looks panicked.

description: Nest-making with mammary enlargement in an intact female should open reproductive questioning.
requestText: My unspayed dog is carrying toys around, nesting, and her mammary area looks enlarged.

description: Prolonged heat-style spotting should open reproductive questioning.
requestText: My dog has had spotting from her vulva for a lot longer than usual.

description: Postpartum mammary pain and redness should open reproductive follow-up.
requestText: She had puppies recently and one of her mammary glands is red, hard, and painful.

description: Scrotal swelling without collapse should open reproductive questioning.
requestText: My dog has swelling around his testicles and keeps licking there.

description: Stable vaginal discharge should open reproductive questioning when no collapse signs are present.
requestText: There is some discharge from my dog's vulva but she is still eating and acting okay.

description: Green discharge before a puppy is delivered should escalate.
requestText: My dog in labor has green discharge and no puppy has come out yet.

description: Heavy postpartum bleeding should escalate.
requestText: She had puppies yesterday and now she is bleeding heavily and seems weak.

description: Suspected retained puppy with shock signs should escalate.
requestText: She finished having puppies but now seems weak, distressed, and still has strong contractions.

description: Foul discharge with systemic illness in an intact female should escalate.
requestText: My unspayed dog has smelly discharge, is drinking a lot, and feels feverish and miserable.

description: Penis stuck out with swelling and distress should escalate.
requestText: My dog's penis is stuck out, swollen, and he is very uncomfortable.

description: Small chocolate exposure without symptoms should still open triage questioning.
requestText: My little dog may have eaten some milk chocolate but seems normal right now.

description: Possible marijuana exposure with mild signs should open toxin triage.
requestText: My dog got into an edible and now seems sleepy and wobbly.

description: Garlic or onion ingestion should open toxin triage when no collapse signs are present.
requestText: My dog ate a bunch of oniony leftovers and now I am worried.

description: Possible ibuprofen ingestion should open toxin questioning immediately.
requestText: I think my dog may have eaten one of my ibuprofen pills.

description: Possible antifreeze ingestion should escalate immediately.
requestText: My dog licked green fluid from the garage floor and is now staggering and drooling.

description: Sago palm ingestion should escalate immediately.
requestText: My dog chewed on a sago palm and is vomiting now.

description: Grape ingestion with vomiting or weakness should escalate.
requestText: He ate a bunch of grapes and now is vomiting and acting weak.

description: Household toxin exposure with GI signs and weakness should escalate.
requestText: My dog got into a toxic plant and now is vomiting and seems really weak.

description: Tremors after eating moldy food should escalate immediately.
requestText: He got into moldy trash and now he is shaking hard and cannot walk right.

description: Night cough with stable behavior should open cardiac-respiratory questioning.
requestText: My older dog coughs more at night and after resting.

description: Exercise intolerance without collapse should open cardiac questioning.
requestText: My dog tires out much faster on walks and wants to stop early.

description: Gradual abdominal fluid suspicion should open questioning when no crisis signs are present.
requestText: His belly seems to be filling out and he gets tired more easily lately.

description: Single recovered fainting spell should open urgent cardiac questioning.
requestText: My dog briefly fainted on a walk but came back around quickly.

description: Collapse with blue or gray gums should escalate immediately.
requestText: My dog collapsed and his gums looked blue-gray.

description: Resting respiratory distress in a heart-disease style presentation should escalate.
requestText: He has known heart disease and now is breathing hard even while lying still.

description: Collapse after excitement with delayed recovery should escalate.
requestText: My dog got excited, collapsed, and still seems weak and out of it.

description: Rapid breathing with pallor and weakness should escalate.
requestText: She is breathing fast, looks pale, and can barely stand up.

description: Stable new skin lump should open mass characterization questioning.
requestText: I found a round new lump on my dog's side and it does not seem painful.

description: Weight loss plus a new mass should open serious systemic questioning.
requestText: My dog has been losing weight and I also found a lump near his ribs.

description: Possible oral mass with otherwise stable behavior should open questioning.
requestText: There seems to be a growth in my dog's mouth and his breath is terrible.

description: Gradual limb pain and swelling should open orthopedic-oncology questioning.
requestText: My big dog has a swollen painful leg and a limp that has been getting worse for weeks.

description: Multiple enlarged lymph-node style swellings should open systemic questioning.
requestText: I can feel several swollen lumps under my dog's jaw and behind his knees.

description: Acute collapse with abdominal distension in a cancer-risk presentation should escalate.
requestText: My older dog suddenly collapsed, has a swollen belly, and his gums are very pale.

description: Heavy bleeding from an oral mass should escalate.
requestText: There is a growth in my dog's mouth and now it is bleeding a lot.

description: Neck swelling causing breathing or swallowing trouble should escalate.
requestText: My dog has a large throat lump and now he is struggling to swallow and breathe.

description: Severe nosebleed with weakness should escalate.
requestText: My dog has a major nosebleed and is now weak and shaky.

description: Hit-by-car trauma with weakness and pale gums should escalate immediately.
requestText: My dog was hit by a car, can barely stand, and his gums look white.

description: Acute gastric dilation without retching should escalate.
requestText: My dog's belly is hugely swollen and he keeps pacing and drooling.

description: Facial swelling and hives after vaccination should escalate as a possible anaphylactic reaction.
requestText: A few hours after his shots my dog's face puffed up and he broke out in hives.

description: Deep bite wound with tissue damage should escalate.
requestText: My dog was attacked and has deep puncture wounds on his chest.

description: Known diabetic dog that is disoriented and weak should escalate.
requestText: My diabetic dog is stumbling around and seems very confused.

description: Seizure lasting more than five minutes should escalate as status epilepticus.
requestText: My dog has been having a seizure for over five minutes and won't stop.

description: Choking with gagging and pawing at mouth should escalate.
requestText: My dog is gagging and pawing at his mouth like something is stuck.

description: Sudden cloudy bulging eye with pain should escalate.
requestText: My dog's eye is suddenly cloudy, bulging, and he seems to be in pain.

description: Tiny pinpoint bleeding spots on gums with weakness should escalate.
requestText: There are tiny red spots all over my dog's gums and she is very weak.

description: Chemical burn to skin or paws should escalate.
requestText: My dog stepped in drain cleaner and his paw is red and blistered.

description: Widespread hives with facial swelling should escalate.
requestText: My dog is covered in hives and his face is puffing up after a bug bite.

description: Female dog with signs of urinary discomfort and frequent squatting should escalate.
requestText: My dog keeps trying to pee but nothing comes out and she's crying.

description: Possible electrocution from chewing a cord should escalate.
requestText: My puppy chewed an electrical cord and now he is trembling and weak.

description: Acute weakness with pale gums and dark urine should escalate.
requestText: My dog is extremely weak, his gums are pale, and his urine is dark brown.

description: Suspected snake bite with swelling and pain should escalate.
requestText: My dog was bitten by a snake and his face is swelling badly.

description: Collapse with history of intermittent GI signs should escalate as Addisonian crisis.
requestText: My dog has been having intermittent vomiting and now she has collapsed.

description: Profuse bloody diarrhea with weakness and pale gums should escalate.
requestText: My dog has explosive bloody diarrhea and is weak with pale gums.

description: Severe breathing difficulty after kennel exposure should escalate.
requestText: After boarding, my dog is struggling to breathe and making honking sounds.

description: Restlessness after large meal with swollen belly should escalate.
requestText: After eating a big meal my dog is restless and his belly looks tight and swollen.

description: First-time seizure in an adult dog should escalate.
requestText: My dog just had his first ever seizure and is now confused and disoriented.

description: Labored breathing with abdominal effort should escalate.
requestText: My dog is breathing with great effort using his belly muscles.

description: Vomiting green bile repeatedly should escalate.
requestText: My dog keeps throwing up green bile and won't eat or drink.

description: Limping with crying in pain should escalate.
requestText: My dog is limping and crying in pain and won't let me touch his back.

description: Urinary blockage with vocalizing distress should escalate.
requestText: My dog is crying and trying to pee but nothing has come out for hours.

description: Skin avulsion wound should escalate.
requestText: My dog has a large flap of skin hanging off his shoulder from a fence incident.

description: Trembling with weakness and cold extremities should escalate.
requestText: My dog is trembling, weak, and his ears and paws feel cold.

description: Unknown seizure duration should escalate as unsafe unknown.
requestText: I don't know how long it lasted, it felt like forever.

description: Unknown breathing pattern should escalate as unsafe unknown.
requestText: I can't describe how he's breathing, he just seems off.

description: No recovery between seizure episodes should escalate.
requestText: My dog had another seizure and still cannot stand up or recognize me between the episodes.

description: Green discharge before any puppy appears should escalate.
requestText: My pregnant dog started hard labor and now green discharge is coming out but no puppy has appeared yet.

description: Heavy bleeding after delivery should escalate.
requestText: My dog gave birth a few hours ago and now she is bleeding a lot and seems weak.

description: Hard labor for hours without producing a puppy should escalate.
requestText: My dog has been having strong contractions for over two hours and still has not delivered a puppy.

description: Head shaking with ear odor and discharge should be same-day.
requestText: My dog keeps shaking his head and his ear smells bad with dark discharge.

description: Multiple vomiting episodes in 24 hours without blood should be same-day.
requestText: My dog has thrown up four times today but is still trying to drink.

description: Non-weight-bearing lameness should be same-day.
requestText: My dog won't put any weight on his front leg after playing fetch.

description: Blood visible in urine without obstruction signs should be same-day.
requestText: I noticed blood in my dog's urine this morning but she is still peeing normally.

description: Rapidly growing hot spot should be same-day.
requestText: My dog developed a big red wet sore on her side overnight.

description: Worsening cough over several days with normal energy should be same-day.
requestText: My dog has been coughing for five days and it is getting worse but she still eats.

description: Diarrhea persisting for three days should be same-day.
requestText: My dog has had diarrhea for three days straight but is still acting normal.

description: Red squinting eye without discharge should be same-day.
requestText: My dog is squinting one eye and it looks red.

description: Persistent trembling for hours should be same-day.
requestText: My dog has been trembling for hours even after being warmed up.

description: Mild abdominal swelling without distress should be same-day.
requestText: My dog's belly looks more swollen than usual but he is still eating.

description: Intense scratching with skin damage should be same-day.
requestText: My dog is scratching so hard she has raw patches on her skin.

description: Noticeable weight loss over two weeks should be same-day.
requestText: My dog has lost a noticeable amount of weight in the last two weeks.

description: Bleeding from gums with dental pain should be same-day.
requestText: My dog's gums are bleeding and she cries when I try to check her teeth.

description: Spreading hair loss patches should be same-day.
requestText: The bald patches on my dog are spreading to new areas.

description: Vaginal discharge without systemic illness should be same-day.
requestText: My dog has a discharge from her vulva but is otherwise acting normal.

description: Excessive water consumption over several days should be same-day.
requestText: My dog is drinking entire bowls of water and refilling them multiple times a day.

description: New hiding behavior with appetite changes should be same-day.
requestText: My dog is hiding under the bed and not eating like usual.

description: Frequent regurgitation after meals should be same-day.
requestText: My dog regurgitates after almost every meal now.

description: Tense painful abdomen should be same-day.
requestText: My dog's belly feels tight and hard and he cries when I press it.

description: Worsening facial swelling should be same-day.
requestText: My dog's face has been getting more swollen over the past few hours.

description: Scooting with visible blood should be same-day.
requestText: My dog is scooting and I see bloody stool spots where he was sitting.

description: Rapidly spreading skin infection should be same-day.
requestText: The greasy red skin infection on my dog has doubled in size since yesterday.

description: Excessive drooling with swallowing difficulty should be same-day.
requestText: My dog is drooling constantly and seems to have trouble swallowing.

description: Senior not eating for multiple days should be same-day.
requestText: My senior dog hasn't eaten in three days.

description: Chronic limp that suddenly worsens should be same-day.
requestText: My dog has had a bad hip for years but today he can barely walk.

description: A fall with ongoing soreness should open the trauma flow.
requestText: My dog jumped off the deck wrong and now seems sore and shaky.

description: Separation anxiety with destructive behavior should open behavioral questioning.
requestText: My dog destroys furniture and barks nonstop whenever I leave the house.

description: Thunder phobia with panting and pacing should open behavioral questioning.
requestText: During storms my dog pants heavily, hides, and trembles uncontrollably.

description: Chronic bad breath should open dental/systemic questioning.
requestText: My dog has extremely bad breath that has been getting worse.

description: Visible fleas with scratching should open parasitology questioning.
requestText: I can see fleas jumping on my dog and he won't stop scratching.

description: Tick found attached to skin should open parasitology questioning.
requestText: I found a tick embedded in my dog's skin after a walk in the woods.

description: Significant weight gain should open nutritional/metabolic questioning.
requestText: My dog has gotten much fatter over the past year and struggles on walks.

description: Chronic paw licking should open dermatology/behavioral questioning.
requestText: My dog constantly licks her front paws and they are turning brown.

description: Scooting on rear end should open anal gland questioning.
requestText: My dog keeps dragging his bottom across the carpet and leaves stool smears behind.

description: Scooting with foul odor should open anal gland questioning.
requestText: My dog is scooting and there is a foul fishy leakage on the blankets afterward.

description: Skin pustules and redness should open dermatology questioning.
requestText: My dog has red, greasy skin with pus-filled bumps on his belly.

description: Loud snoring with breathing pauses should open respiratory questioning.
requestText: My dog snores very loudly and sometimes seems to stop breathing while sleeping.

description: Mild lethargy after vaccination should open monitoring questioning.
requestText: My puppy got shots yesterday and seems a bit tired and sore today.

description: Indoor urine marking in a previously house-trained dog should open behavioral/urinary questioning.
requestText: My dog started peeing on furniture even though he was house-trained.

description: Shivering and reluctance to go outside in cold should open systemic questioning.
requestText: My dog refuses to go outside in cold weather and shivers even with a sweater.

description: Overgrown nails clicking on floor should open grooming questioning.
requestText: My dog's nails are so long they click on the floor and curve under.

description: Excessive drooling in a non-slobber breed should open oral/systemic questioning.
requestText: My dog is drooling way more than usual and keeps pawing at his mouth.

description: New wart-like growth on skin should open mass questioning.
requestText: My dog has a cauliflower-looking bump on his eyelid.

description: Dog yelps when belly is touched should open abdominal questioning.
requestText: My dog yelps when I try to pick him up or touch his stomach.

description: Episodes of honking inhalation should open respiratory questioning.
requestText: My dog makes loud honking noises like he is trying to sneeze but inhaling.

description: Compulsive tail chasing with self-injury should open behavioral questioning.
requestText: My dog spins in circles chasing his tail, bites it raw, and snaps if we try to stop him.

description: Mild facial swelling without breathing issues should open allergic questioning.
requestText: My dog's face looks slightly puffy but he is breathing fine.

description: Gradual weight gain should open nutritional questioning.
requestText: My dog has been gradually getting heavier over the last year.

description: Vague "dog is sick" presentation should open general questioning.
requestText: My dog just doesn't seem right.

description: Slang description of vomiting should still open GI flow.
requestText: My dog keeps hurling his food back up.

description: Contradictory report of energy level should open clarifying questions.
requestText: My dog is acting fine but also not himself. He runs around but then just lays there.

description: Multiple complaints in one message should open prioritized questioning.
requestText: My dog is coughing, threw up once, and is scratching like crazy.

description: Low-literacy description of abdominal distension should open abdominal questioning.
requestText: His belly be real big like a balloon.

description: Vague "not eating" should open appetite/dental/systemic questioning.
requestText: He just won't eat his food anymore.

description: Slang for diarrhea should open GI flow.
requestText: My dog has the runs really bad.

description: Conflicting weight-bearing details should force a clarifying orthopedic question before limping triage proceeds.
requestText: Sometimes he limps and sometimes he runs fine. It comes and goes.

description: Multiple systemic complaints should open prioritized questioning.
requestText: My dog is tired all the time, vomited yesterday, and drinking a lot.

description: A plain-language eye complaint should still route into the ophthalmic questioning path.
requestText: His eye all goopy and squinty.

description: Vague lump discovery should open mass characterization.
requestText: Found something under his skin. Not sure what it is.

description: Slang for GI upset should open GI questioning.
requestText: His stomach is all messed up. He keeps retching.

description: Skin, ear, and licking combo should open dermatology flow.
requestText: She's scratching her ears, her skin is red, and she licks her paws.

description: Mismatched thirst-versus-urination details should reopen clarification before urinary triage advances.
requestText: I think she drinks more but I also filled her bowl twice yesterday.

description: A simple 'leg hurt' owner phrase should still open the lameness pathway without losing nuance.
requestText: His leg be hurting him bad.

description: Intermittent vague coughing should open respiratory questioning.
requestText: He does this coughing thing sometimes.

description: Weight loss, hair loss, and tiredness should open systemic questioning.
requestText: My dog is getting thinner, losing hair, and always sleeping.

description: Slang for trembling should open neurologic questioning.
requestText: My dog has got the shakes.

description: Low-literacy abdominal pain should open abdominal questioning.
requestText: Her belly hurt. She cries when she moves.

description: Contradictory vomiting timeline should open clarifying questions.
requestText: She threw up this morning but also maybe it was yesterday. I'm not sure.

description: If the owner cannot place when diarrhea started, store onset as unknown and continue the GI follow-up.
requestText: I honestly don't remember exactly when it started.

description: Missing vomit color observation should record unknown without breaking the vomiting flow.
requestText: I didn't really look at what color it was.

description: When the owner cannot identify the affected leg, the orthopedic follow-up should capture unknown and continue.
requestText: I can't tell which leg it is, he just seems off.

description: Unclear cough duration should be preserved as unknown while respiratory questioning keeps moving.
requestText: I'm not sure how long he's been coughing.

description: If the owner cannot localize the itch, the dermatology flow should safely retain an unknown location.
requestText: She scratches everywhere, I can't pinpoint it.

description: Urine color can remain unknown when it was not observed, as long as urinary questioning continues safely.
requestText: I didn't notice the color of her urine.

description: An unmeasured skin mass should keep its size field unknown without blocking the mass workup.
requestText: I found it but I'm not sure how big it is.

description: When nasal discharge color was not seen, record unknown and continue the respiratory follow-up.
requestText: There's discharge but I can't tell what color.

description: Energy change can stay unknown when the owner truly cannot compare it to baseline.
requestText: I'm not sure if his energy is different, he's always been pretty calm.

description: If the owner cannot judge wound depth, the skin-wound flow should store unknown and keep triage safe.
requestText: I can see a wound but I don't know how deep it goes.

description: Vomiting frequency should accept an unknown answer when episodes were not fully observed.
requestText: I'm not sure how many times she threw up.

description: If no rectal temperature was taken, the fever check should record unknown and move to the next safe observable.
requestText: I don't have a thermometer so I can't tell if she has a fever.

description: Frequency uncertainty should not end the diarrhea flow when the owner only knows the stool is abnormal.
requestText: I'm not sure how many times he went.

description: Senior dog with confusion and disorientation should open geriatric questioning.
requestText: My old dog gets stuck in corners and stares at walls.

description: Worsening arthritis symptoms should open mobility questioning.
requestText: My dog has arthritis but it seems much worse lately. He can barely stand.

description: Recurrent ear infections should open chronic management questioning.
requestText: My dog gets ear infections every few months and I'm tired of it.

description: Chronic itchy flares with greasy odor should open recurrent dermatology questioning.
requestText: My dog gets itchy every spring and his coat gets greasy and yeasty-smelling.

description: Vision loss in senior dog should open geriatric/neurologic questioning.
requestText: My old dog bumps into furniture and seems to have trouble seeing.

description: Hearing loss in senior dog should open geriatric questioning.
requestText: My dog doesn't respond when I call his name anymore.

description: Intermittent vomiting over months should open chronic GI questioning.
requestText: My dog throws up once every week or so for the past few months.

description: Urinary incontinence in senior dog should open urinary questioning.
requestText: My old dog leaks urine while sleeping.

description: Chronic intermittent diarrhea should open GI questioning.
requestText: My dog has soft stool on and off for months.

description: Chronic cough in senior should open cardiac/respiratory questioning.
requestText: My old dog has been coughing on and off for months.

description: Multiple senior decline signs should open comprehensive geriatric questioning.
requestText: My dog is sleeping all day, not eating well, and seems confused.

description: Severe dental decay in senior should open dental questioning.
requestText: My old dog has terrible teeth, some are falling out.
